MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Joseph Hunter appeared on his own behalf.
Defendants/Appellants Norbert Lee and Heidy Lee appeared on their own behalf.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Plaintiff/Respondent Joseph Hunter sworn and testified on his own behalf.
Defendants/Appellants Norbert Lee and Heidy Lee testified on their own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit 1: Documents.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit A: Documents, photographs.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
